---
title: "About Me"
---

## My journey

I'm Wendy Lucio, a Mexican actuary and data professional based in Dublin, Ireland. I hold a degree in **Actuarial Science from UNAM** — one of Latin America's most prestigious universities — and a **Diploma in Data Science**. I'm currently completing an **MSc in Business Analytics at DCU**.

My career has been driven by a simple belief: the best decisions come from combining rigorous data analysis with deep business understanding.

---

## Professional experience

### Banorte — Deputy Director of Credit Risk
**2019 – 2024 | Mexico City**

Led a team of 5 analysts in the Credit Card Portfolio Management division. Responsibilities included:

- Design and monitoring of credit risk strategies across the TDC portfolio
- Development of predictive models for credit line management
- Reporting and analysis for senior leadership and regulatory bodies
- Mentoring and developing junior analysts

### Scotiabank Mexico — Credit Risk Analyst
**2017 – 2019 | Mexico City**

Worked in the Collections Risk area across multiple products:

- TDC, Auto, Personal Loans, Mortgage, and Scotialine
- Developed risk scorecards and collection strategies
- Performed vintage and roll rate analysis

---

## Skills

| Technical | Business | Tools |
|-----------|----------|-------|
| Python | Credit Risk | SAS |
| R | Portfolio Management | SQL |
| Machine Learning | Team Leadership | Power BI |
| Statistics | Regulatory Reporting | Git |

---

## What drives me

I'm fascinated by how **fintechs like Revolut and Nubank** are disrupting traditional banking. Unlike legacy banks, they use data in real time to make smarter, faster decisions. I want to be part of that transformation — bringing the rigour of traditional risk management into the agility of the fintech world.

Living and studying in Dublin has reinforced my belief that the best insights come from diverse perspectives. I enjoy leading teams, learning from different profiles, and holding myself to high standards in everything I do.
